"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\launcher.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\launcher.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\launcher.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\launcher.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\rikov\Documents\KernelOverloards\launcher.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblauncher.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\launcher.dir\linkLibs.rsp
